name: Multilingual Dataset
description: A multilingual controlled vocabulary dataset generated by Gemini 3 agents. BS4 Extraction Pattern (generic for all HIPS HTML pages): (1) Title: soup.find('title').get_text().strip(), (2) Date: soup.find('meta', property='article:published_time')['content'] (or name='vf:date-published-v2' / 'vf:date-published'), (3) Article Content: soup.find('article', class_='custom-full-content') (with scripts, styles, noscript, and iframe tags decomposed).

distribution.name: CH0604_Opioids_and_Other_Psychoactive_Substances_clean.txt
distribution.description: Clean plaintext extract of the original HIPS HTML document for CH0604, omitting template headers, footers, navigation, styles, and scripts. BS4 Extraction Pattern: (1) Title: soup.find('title').get_text().strip(), (2) Date: soup.find('meta', property='article:published_time')['content'] (or name='vf:date-published-v2' / 'vf:date-published'), (3) Article Content: soup.find('article', class_='custom-full-content') (scripts, styles, noscript, and iframe tags decomposed).

field.name: context
field.description: The definition or context of the term.

field.name: language
field.description: The ISO 639-1 language code of the translation.

field.name: confidence
field.description: The confidence score of the translation (0.0 to 1.0).

field.name: winning_model
field.description: The software agent selected as the source for this translation row.

field.name: consensus
field.description: The decision reached by the arbitrage logic (e.g., consensus reached and vote count).

field.name: version
field.description: The version of the software package used.

isBasedOn.name: CH0604_Opioids_and_Other_Psychoactive_Substances.html
isBasedOn.description: Original UNDRR/ISC Hazard Information Profile (HIPS) page for CH0604: Opioids and Other Psychoactive Substances. This self-contained HTML document (base64-encoded) preserves the full authoritative content as published at https://www.preventionweb.net/understanding-disaster-risk/terminology/hips/ch0604. It includes: (1) the official SKOS concept definition with skos:prefLabel, skos:definition, skos:scopeNote, skos:broader, and skos:altLabel; (2) structured JSON-LD metadata embedded in a <script type='application/ld+json'> block; (3) thematic sections covering hazard drivers, impacts, risk metrics, multi-hazard context, monitoring/early-warning guidance, and risk management measures; (4) bibliographic references and provenance (dct:source, prov:wasQuotedFrom, prov:wasInfluencedBy). Parsing Tip: The core technical content can be extracted from the HTML structure by targeting the <article class='custom-full-content'> (or fallback <div class='main-container'>) container and decomposing boilerplate script, style, noscript, and iframe tags. Section titles follow repeated patterns: major sections use <h2> and <h3> tags with class 'field-label-above' or 'field-group-title' (e.g., 'Primary reference(s)', 'Annotations', 'Drivers', 'Impacts', 'Risk Management', 'Monitoring', 'References'), and inline field labels use <div> with class 'field--label' or 'field-label-inline' (e.g., 'Unique identifier / Notation', 'Synonyms', 'Definition'). Intended uses: AI model training on technical disaster-risk terminology, multilingual controlled-vocabulary generation, information extraction, and semantic enrichment of the UNDRR-ISC Hazard Information Profiles dataset.

isBasedOn.name: CH0604_Opioids_and_Other_Psychoactive_Substances_clean.txt
isBasedOn.description: Clean plaintext extract of the original HIPS HTML document for CH0604, omitting template headers, footers, navigation, styles, and scripts. BS4 Extraction Pattern: (1) Title: soup.find('title').get_text().strip(), (2) Date: soup.find('meta', property='article:published_time')['content'] (or name='vf:date-published-v2' / 'vf:date-published'), (3) Article Content: soup.find('article', class_='custom-full-content') (scripts, styles, noscript, and iframe tags decomposed).

bs4ExtractionPattern.title: soup.find('title').get_text().strip()
bs4ExtractionPattern.article: soup.find('article', class_='custom-full-content').find('div', class_='col-md-9') (with scripts, styles, noscript, and iframe tags decomposed)
bs4ExtractionPattern.fulltext: soup.find('article', class_='custom-full-content') (with scripts, styles, noscript, and iframe tags decomposed)
